summary:
Intent: Investigate why context-turns JSONL lines omitted cache split.
Approach: Traced the tap parser and confirmed input/read/write/output were folded.
Artifacts: edited proxy-bridge/server.mjs analyzer.
Result: Cache columns now carried separately.

Intent: Add gzip-at-close for the raw-bodies sibling file.
Approach: Wrapped the close handler to gzip then unlink the plaintext.
Artifacts: edited context-turns writer.
Result: .gz produced, plaintext removed on clean close.

Intent: Wire the age sweeper for retention.
Approach: Drove the sweeper job via CONTEXT_TURNS_RETENTION_DAYS on a temp measurements dir.
Artifacts: added context-turns-sweeper-job.sh test harness.
Result: Files older than retention deleted; younger kept.

Intent: Unrelated prior-day observation outside the span window.
Approach: Should NOT correlate to a turn inside the 2026-07-07 10:00-11:00 span.
Artifacts: none.
Result: Sits before the window to prove nearest-by-createdAt filtering.
